CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Invoice__c)), leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Y_hidden_AccEnabled__c , IF( NOT( ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payment__c)), leaseworks__Payment__r.leaseworks__Y_hidden_AccEnabled__c , IF( NOT( ISBLANK(leaseworks__LOC_Transactions__c)), leaseworks__LOC_Transactions__r.leaseworks__AccEnabled__c , IF( NOT( ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payable__c)), leaseworks__Payable__r.leaseworks__Accounting_Enabled__c, IF( NOT( ISBLANK(leaseworks__Credit_Memo__c)), leaseworks__Credit_Memo__r.leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Acc_Enabled__c , IF( NOT( ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payouts__c)), leaseworks__Payouts__r.leaseworks__Accounting_Enabled__c, IF( NOT( ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payment_on_Account__c)), leaseworks__Payment_on_Account__r.leaseworks__Global_Accounting_Setting__r.leaseworks__Accounting_ON__c , false)))))))
CustomField.label: _AccEnabled
